# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for Cloud Storage bucket that stores application backups. Use default settings without versioning or lifecycle management to keep configuration simple. This is for our backup storage that we'll enhance later based on retention requirements.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

---
#CloudStorageBackupTemplate
apiVersion: "compute.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1"
kind: StorageBucket
metadata:
  name: "your-backup-storage-bucket-<project_id>"
  namespace: "<project>"
spec:
  location: "<region>europe-west3" # choose your zone
  billing:
    paymentType: PAYASYOUGO
  iamPolicy: {}
  labels: {"key":"value"}
---
apiVersion: compute.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: StorageBucketIamMember
metadata:
  name: "your-backup-storage-bucket-<project_id>"
  namespace: "<project>" #choose your project
spec:
  role: roles/storage.objectAdmin  # choose the admin role to be given on the backup bucket (choose whatever you prefer)
  member: serviceAccount:<<EMAIL>" #choose your service account
---
apiVersion: compute.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta2
kind: StorageBucketIamMember
metadata:
  name: "your-backup-storage-bucket-<project_id>"
  namespace: "<project>"  # choose the project
spec:
  role: roles/storage.objectCreator  # choose a role that will be given to objects created on the backup bucket (use whatever you prefer)
  member: serviceAccount:<<EMAIL>" # choose your service account 
---
apiVersion: compute.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta2
kind: StorageBucketIamMember
metadata:
  name: "your-backup-storage-bucket-<project_id>"
  namespace: "<project>"   # choose the project 
spec:
  role: roles/storage.legacyBucketOwner  # choose a role that will be given to users who will be granted access to this bucket later (use whatever you prefer)
  member: serviceAccount:<<EMAIL>" # choose your service account 
---
apiVersion: compute.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta2
kind: StorageBucketIamMember
metadata:
  name: "your-backup-storage-bucket-<project_id>"
  namespace: "<project>"   # choose the project
spec:
  role: roles/storage.legacyBucketOwner  # choose a role that will be given to users who will be granted access to this bucket later (use whatever you prefer)
  member: serviceAccount:<<EMAIL>" # choose your service account
